metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for AI task management and safety guard hooks

plugins.name: taskmaster
plugins.description: Universal AI-powered task and backlog management. Kanban viewer, session tracking, worktree isolation, dependency graphs, and quality gates. Drop into any project.

plugins.name: guard-hooks
plugins.description: Safety guard hooks that block destructive CLI commands and sensitive file edits, with in-flow user approval via UserPromptSubmit.
